page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDC1425 or TLPL476.

Formerly: EDC1425.

TLPL477 Teaching Academically, Culturally, and Linguistically Diverse Students in Middle School and Secondary Education (2 Credits) Instruction on methods of teaching academically, culturally, and linguistically diverse students in middle school and secondary classrooms.

Restriction: Must be in the teacher education program; or permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.

Credit Only Granted for. TLPL488B or TLPL477.
